zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan Cathcart於1424年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特時，他的父親Alan Cathcart30歲，母親Janet Maxwell14歲。他和Janet Maxwell至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1497年10月12日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan Cathcart于1424年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特时，他的父亲Alan Cathcart30岁，母亲Janet Maxwell14岁。他和Janet Maxwell至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1497年10月12日在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan Cathcart was born in 1424, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Alan Cathcart, was 30 and his mother, Janet Maxwell, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Janet Maxwell. He died on 12 October 1497, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan Cathcart est né en 1424, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Alan Cathcart, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Janet Maxwell, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Janet Maxwell. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1497, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan Cathcart 1424 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Cathcart 30 und seine Mutter Janet Maxwell 14. Er hatte mit Janet Maxwell mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1497 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Cathcart è nato il nel 1424 nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alan Cathcart, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Janet Maxwell, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Janet Maxwell. Morì il 12 ottobre 1497, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Cathcartが1424年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートで生まれた時，父Alan Cathcartは30歳，母Janet Maxwellは14歳であった。彼はJanet Maxwellとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1497年10月12日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Cathcart(이)가 1424년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Cathcart(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Maxwell(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Janet Maxwell(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 10월 12일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Cathcart nasceu em 1424, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan Cathcart, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Janet Maxwell, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Janet Maxwell. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1497, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan Cathcart родился в 1424 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alan Cathcart было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Maxwell, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Janet Maxwell. Он умер 12 октября 1497 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan Cathcart nació en 1424, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Alan Cathcart, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Janet Maxwell, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Janet Maxwell. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1497, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
